inputs.label: Ethereum Amount
inputs.businessContext: The amount of Ethereum to convert, before transaction fees.

businessContext_i18n.en: The amount of Ethereum to convert, before transaction fees.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşlem ücretlerinden önce dönüştürülecek Ethereum miktarı.

inputs.label: ETH Price (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Current market price of 1 ETH in US dollars.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current market price of 1 ETH in US dollars.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 ETH'nin ABD doları cinsinden güncel piyasa fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktueller Marktpreis von 1 ETH in US-Dollar.

inputs.label: Gas Limit
inputs.businessContext: Maximum gas units allowed for the Ethereum transaction (standard ETH transfer: 21000).

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum gas units allowed for the Ethereum transaction (standard ETH transfer: 21000).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ethereum işlemi için izin verilen maksimum gaz birimi (standart ETH transferi: 21000).

inputs.label: Max Fee per Gas
inputs.businessContext: Maximum fee per gas unit in Gwei (1 ETH = 10^9 Gwei). This covers base fee + priority fee.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum fee per gas unit in Gwei (1 ETH = 10^9 Gwei). This covers base fee + priority fee.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gwei cinsinden gaz birimi başına maksimum ücret (1 ETH = 10^9 Gwei). Temel ücret + öncelik ücretini kapsar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximale Gebühr pro Gaseinheit in Gwei (1 ETH = 10^9 Gwei). Deckt Basisgebühr + Prioritätsgebühr ab.

inputs.label: Network Congestion Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier to simulate higher gas prices during network congestion (1 for normal, >1 for high demand).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier to simulate higher gas prices during network congestion (1 for normal, >1 for high demand).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ağ tıkanıklığı sırasında daha yüksek gaz fiyatlarını simüle etmek için çarpan (normal için 1, yüksek talep için >1).
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator zur Simulation höherer Gaspreise bei Netzüberlastung (1 für normal, >1 für hohe Nachfrage).

inputs.label: Conversion Fee (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage fee charged by the exchange or service for converting crypto to fiat currency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage fee charged by the exchange or service for converting crypto to fiat currency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kripto parayı itibari paraya dönüştürmek için borsa veya hizmet tarafından alınan yüzde ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentuale Gebühr, die von der Börse oder dem Dienst für die Umwandlung von Krypto in Fiat-Währung erhoben wird.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
